# zendesk_organization (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk organization by ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the organization. Provide either id or name.
- `name` (String) The name of the organization. Provide either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `details` (String)
- `domain_names` (Set of String)
- `external_id` (String)
- `group_id` (Number)
- `notes` (String)
- `organization_fields` (Map of String)
- `shared_comments` (Boolean)
- `shared_tickets` (Boolean)
- `tags` (Set of String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String)
